_metadata.title: Obligations of Providers of General-Purpose AI Models with Systemic Risk

primary_official_source.name: EUR-Lex -- Official Journal of the European Union

published: NIST AI 600-1 -- AI Risk Management Framework: GPAI Profile
upcoming: EU AI Office Code of Practice for GPAI (published 2025-05-02)
CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for GPAI systemic risk (expected 2027)

obligations.source_quote: perform model evaluation in accordance with standardised protocols and tools reflecting the state of the art, including conducting and documenting adversarial testing of the model with a view to identifying and mitigating systemic risks;

decomposed_atoms.description: Must perform model evaluation per standardized protocols
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL perform model evaluation in accordance with standardised protocols

decomposed_atoms.description: Must conduct and document adversarial testing
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL conduct and document adversarial testing to identify and mitigate systemic risks

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for evaluation scripts, adversarial testing documentation, red-teaming results, benchmark results
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether evaluation uses appropriate standardized protocols

obligations.source_quote: assess and mitigate possible systemic risks at Union level, including their sources, that may stem from the development, the placing on the market, or the use of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk;

decomposed_atoms.description: Must assess possible systemic risks at Union level
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL assess and mitigate possible systemic risks at Union level

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for systemic risk assessment documentation
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether systemic risks have been adequately assessed and mitigated

obligations.source_quote: keep track of, document, and report, without undue delay, to the AI Office and, as appropriate, to national competent authorities, relevant information about serious incidents and possible corrective measures to address them;

decomposed_atoms.description: Must track and document serious incidents
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL keep track of and document serious incidents

decomposed_atoms.description: Must report to AI Office without undue delay
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL report to AI Office without undue delay

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for incident tracking systems, reporting procedures, incident documentation
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether incident tracking and reporting is adequate

obligations.source_quote: ensure an adequate level of cybersecurity protection for the general-purpose AI model with systemic risk and the physical infrastructure of the model.

decomposed_atoms.description: Must ensure adequate cybersecurity for model and physical infrastructure
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL ensure adequate cybersecurity protection for model and physical infrastructure

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for security policies, access controls, infrastructure security documentation
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether cybersecurity level is 'adequate' for the systemic risk

obligations.source_quote: Providers of general-purpose AI models with systemic risk may rely on codes of practice within the meaning of Article 56 to demonstrate compliance with the obligations set out in paragraph 1 of this Article, until a harmonised standard is published.

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider may use codes of practice to demonstrate compliance until harmonised standard exists
decomposed_atoms.requirement: MAY rely on codes of practice to demonstrate compliance until a harmonised standard is published

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for adherence to approved codes of practice or harmonised standards
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether the provider follows an approved code of practice

obligations.source_quote: Providers of general-purpose AI models with systemic risks who do not adhere to an approved code of practice or do not comply with a European harmonised standard shall demonstrate alternative adequate means of compliance for assessment by the Commission.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to providers who do not follow an approved code of practice or harmonised standard

decomposed_atoms.description: Must demonstrate alternative adequate means of compliance if not following codes/standards
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL demonstrate alternative adequate means of compliance for assessment by the Commission

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for alternative compliance documentation submitted to Commission
